start.speaker: cyrus
start.text: We need to move carefully through here. I can sense something is wrong — the air feels heavy, charged.

vaughn_responds.speaker: vaughn
vaughn_responds.text: What's the plan? We can't stay here forever.

choices.text: Push forward — we can handle whatever's ahead.

push_forward.speaker: cyrus
push_forward.text: We push forward. Stay close and keep your guard up.

scout_ahead.speaker: vaughn
scout_ahead.text: On it. Give me a minute.

vaughn_returns.speaker: vaughn
vaughn_returns.text: Path ahead is clear, but the ground is unstable. We should move quickly.

ask_phaidros.speaker: phaidros
ask_phaidros.text: The ground here is unstable. We should find higher terrain before pressing on.

phaidros_continues.speaker: phaidros
phaidros_continues.text: There's a ridge to the east. It's a longer path, but safer.

cyrus_responds_to_phaidros.speaker: cyrus
cyrus_responds_to_phaidros.text: Good thinking. Let's take the ridge.

conditional_node.speaker: vaughn
conditional_node.text: Phaidros has good instincts. We should listen to him more often.
